title: Stormercraft Items
description: Adds new items by renaming them.
body:
# Stormercraft Items
Adds new items by renaming them.

Requires Optifine (or CIT mod) for custom elytra.

Adds new weapons, tools, hats, and items from the Fallen Kingdom series, Minecraft Dungeons, Minecraft Story Mode, miscellaneous other sources, and my own ideas.

Read "About Pack.txt" for full list of changes.

![Custom swords.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94539c1696d8717013858db4d21e3ae7ca46bdd4.png)

![Custom axes and maces.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f39230a5498d0ad7584716822949f96f3a757738.png)

![Custom hoes, tridents, and picks.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/06eb62a79bf88fad4ce806af9a93139eb80b8c6b.png)

![Custom bows.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c361badf39dd31732ab072711d6e4e98344d1fe.png)

![Custom hats.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6106e03f16fe1b14c0c29da552297e3ea092958e.png)
